meta.title: KADIEBWE MAKINA EDVAIS | IT Engineer & Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Professional portfolio of KADIEBWE MAKINA EDVAIS — IT Engineer, AI expert and Full Stack Developer in Lubumbashi, DRC.
meta.keywords: IT Engineer, developer, AI, Full Stack, Lubumbashi, Congo, cybersecurity
meta.ogTitle: KADIEBWE MAKINA EDVAIS | International IT Engineer
meta.ogDescription: Software development, artificial intelligence and digital solutions for businesses.

hero.description: Information systems, software and infrastructure — versatile profile with a core focus on IS.

about.title: Professional profile
about.lead: Comprehensive technical expertise for ambitious, sustainable projects.
about.subtitle: IT Engineer, software developer & trainer
about.p1: Expert in software development, artificial intelligence, networking and system administration. Graduate in Computer Systems, Software Engineering and AI at Université Protestante de Lubumbashi (UPL), I build robust applications and intelligent systems focused on results.
about.p2: I support businesses, institutions and entrepreneurs in digital transformation: design, development, deployment and training. Structured approach, clear communication and professional deliverables.

skillStacks.ai: Machine learning · Computer vision · Intelligent automation

t1.text: Edvais transformed our IT infrastructure with remarkable expertise. His professionalism and problem-solving skills are exceptional.
t1.name: Jean Mukendi

t2.text: The AI surveillance system exceeded our expectations. An innovative, reliable solution perfectly tailored to our needs.
t2.name: Amina Kabongo

t3.text: Exceptional trainer and talented developer. Edvais combines technical expertise and pedagogy for concrete results.
t3.name: Patrick Lumumba
